content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Login-gated app with paywall provides real demo credentials (fastlane/metadata/review_information/demo_user.txt / demo_password.txt) but notes.txt is a placeholder ("n/a") that doesn't explain how to reach the subscription-gated blocking features (PaywallView.swift:6–8, LoginView.swift:9).
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.1 when reviewers cannot exercise core functionality, and here the app's main features (app blocking, schedules, reports) sit behind both a login and a paywall. The credentials look genuine, but "n/a" review notes may leave the reviewer stuck at the paywall with no way to test premium features. Add notes explaining how to bypass or test the subscription (e.g., sandbox purchase instructions or a demo account with premium pre-activated) and a short walkthrough of the core flow.
